Add CLI evidence and documentation. Keep work inside the repository, do not commit directly, and do not mark the aggregate goal complete until the user explicitly says to finish.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI channel: run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuardEvidence.ps1 from repo root and capture stdout to .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G006-C001-evidence-replay-12.txt. PASS iff script exits 0, stdout contains Status PASS, CheckedEvidenceCount 12, and CheckedEvidenceFiles includes G005-C003-tool-wrapper-regression.txt.

goals.evidence: All G005 criteria are PASS, but Test-ParentPickGuardEvidence.ps1 still checks 9 files from G001-G003 and does not replay G005 evidence.

goals.title: Hardening cycle: reject blank source-map fields
goals.objective: Add one narrow input-validation hardening: for each non-null source entry, require non-empty name, type, claim, and use before writing HTML, while preserving optional empty URL behavior and existing http/https URL validation. Update the verifier with a blank-source-name failure case and capture CLI evidence. Do not checkpoint completion because the aggregate objective explicitly says to continue useful quality work until the user says to finish.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI channel: run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\New-ParentPickReport.ps1 -InputPath .\plugins\parentpick-guard\examples\avent-pacifier-case.json -OutputPath .\.omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C001-source-fields-happy.html from repo root, then parse HTML and capture stdout to .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C001-source-fields-happy.txt. PASS iff exit is 0, stdout reports SourceCount 9, HTML contains Philips Avent support page, and HTML does not contain Unnamed source.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C001-source-fields-happy.txt and .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C001-source-fields-happy.html with cleanup receipt: no spawned process, no tmux session, no temp dir.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C001-source-fields-happy.txt and .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C001-source-fields-happy.html: valid example generated SourceCount 9, contains Philips Avent support page, and contains no Unnamed source | cleanup: no spawned process; no tmux session; no temp dir

successCriteria.scenario: CLI channel: create repo-local fixture .omo\ulw-loop\fixtures\g007-blank-source-name.json by copying the example and setting sources[0].name to an empty string, then run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\New-ParentPickReport.ps1 -InputPath .\.omo\ulw-loop\fixtures\g007-blank-source-name.json -OutputPath .\.omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C002-blank-source-name-should-not-exist.html and capture stdout/stderr/exit to .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C002-blank-source-name.txt. successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C002-blank-source-name.txt plus fixture path with cleanup receipt: no spawned process, no tmux session, output HTML absent.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C002-blank-source-name.txt and .omo\ulw-loop\fixtures\g007-blank-source-name.json: blank source name failed with Input JSON source field must be a non-empty string: sources[0].name and wrote no HTML | cleanup: no spawned process; no tmux session; output HTML absent

successCriteria.scenario: CLI channel: run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuard.ps1 and pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuardEvidence.ps1 from repo root, then capture stdout and docs/RUN_LOG.md evidence to .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G007-C003-verifier-regression.txt. goals.evidence: User instruction says not to mark completion and to add useful todos even when criteria are all checked. Current generator code uses Get-Field defaults such as Unnamed source and empty strings for source name/type/claim/use, so a malformed source row can still pass and render a low-quality source map.

goals.title: Pivot submission to BabyGear Risk Radar root Codex plugin
goals.objective: Convert the repository submission target to the root-level babygear-risk-radar-codex-plugin package requested by the user. Build a Codex CLI plugin named babygear-risk-radar at the repository root with .codex-plugin/plugin.json, skills/babygear-risk-radar/SKILL.md, repo marketplace pointing to ./, PowerShell validation, Markdown examples, SVG demo screenshot, README, reports, MAS-QA, and commit log. Preserve prior ParentPick Guard commits as history, do not add hooks/MCP/apps, do not claim medical certainty, and continue improving until the user explicitly stops.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI channel: run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\scripts\validate-plugin.ps1 from repo root after creating the BabyGear root plugin, capture stdout to .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G008-C001-babygear-validation.txt. PASS iff exit is 0, stdout contains Status PASS, PluginName babygear-risk-radar, MarketplacePath ./, Screenshot ./assets/demo-screenshot.svg, SkillPath skills/babygear-risk-radar/SKILL.md, and GitHub URL https://github.com/procloudkim/babygear-risk-radar-codex-plugin appears in README and plugin.json.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G008-C001-babygear-validation.txt with cleanup receipt: no spawned process, no tmux session, .codex-temp absent.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI channel: create a temporary repo-local copy .\.omo\ulw-loop\fixtures\g008-missing-skill from the BabyGear root files but omit skills\babygear-risk-radar\SKILL.md, then run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\scripts\validate-plugin.ps1 -RootPath .\.omo\ulw-loop\fixtures\g008-missing-skill and capture stdout/stderr to .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G008-C002-missing-skill.txt. PASS iff exit is nonzero, evidence contains Required file missing: skills\babygear-risk-radar\SKILL.md, and the temporary fixture directory is removed.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G008-C002-missing-skill.txt with cleanup receipt: no spawned process, no tmux session, fixture directory removed.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI channel: run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuard.ps1 and pwsh -NoProfile -File .\scripts\validate-plugin.ps1 from repo root, then capture stdout plus git log to .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G008-C003-regression-and-commits.txt. PASS iff both commands exit 0, ParentPick verifier still reports PASS, BabyGear validator reports PASS, git log shows at least 8 commits, and .codex-temp is absent.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo\ulw-loop\evidence\G008-C003-regression-and-commits.txt with cleanup receipt: no spawned process, no tmux session, .codex-temp absent.

goals.evidence: Newest user directive names babygear-risk-radar-codex-plugin as the target and states the submission is a Codex CLI plugin package, not an app. Official OpenAI Codex plugin docs confirm .codex-plugin/plugin.json is required and skills/assets are plugin-root components; hooks need user trust review, so excluding hooks is appropriate for this 90-minute package.
